# Test completo de todas las instrucciones implementadas
# movi r0, 10
00001110
00000000
00001010

# movi r1, 5
00001110
00000001
00000101

# movi r2, 1
00001110
00000010
00000001

# add r0, r1  # r0 = 10 + 5 = 15
00001111
00000000
00000001

# addi r0, 2  # r0 = 15 + 2 = 17
00010000
00000000
00000010

# mul r0, r1  # r0 = 17 * 5 = 85
00010010
00000000
00000001

# div r0, r1  # r0 = 85 // 5 = 17
00010011
00000000
00000001

# inc r0  # r0 = 17 + 1 = 18
00010100
00000000

# dec r0  # r0 = 18 - 1 = 17
00010101
00000000

# neg r0  # r0 = -17 (241 en unsigned)
00010110
00000000

# adc r0, r1  # r0 = 241 + 5 + carry(0) = 246
00010111
00000000
00000001

# sbb r0, r1  # r0 = 246 - 5 - carry(0) = 241
00011000
00000000
00000001

# and_ r0, r1  # r0 = 241 & 5 = 1
00011001
00000000
00000001

# or_ r0, r2  # r0 = 1 | 1 = 1
00011010
00000000
00000010

# xor r0, r2  # r0 = 1 ^ 1 = 0
00011011
00000000
00000010

# not_ r0  # r0 = ~0 & 0xFF = 255
00011100
00000000

# shl r0  # r0 = (255 << 1) & 0xFF = 254
00011101
00000000

# shr r0  # r0 = 254 >> 1 = 127
00011111
00000000

# rol r0  # r0 = rotate left 127 -> (127 << 1 | 127 >> 7) & 0xFF = 254
00011110
00000000

# ror r0  # r0 = rotate right 254 -> (254 >> 1 | 254 << 7) & 0xFF = 127
00100000
00000000

# test r0, r1  # flags from 127 & 5 = 5, Z=0, etc.
00100010
00000000
00000001

# cmp r0, r1  # 127 - 5 = 122, flags
00100001
00000000
00000001

# halt
00000001
